/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/UpgradeShop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/entities/Enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/entities/Entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/entities/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/entities/Projectile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/UI/DashCooldownIndicator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/UI/EnemyDeathEffect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/UI/ScreenShakeController.cpp.o -o game  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-audio.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib
